steps.title: Solve the unknown directly
steps.content: Every answer choice has the form $h(x)=2^x+c$, so this is a one-parameter modeling problem. Enter the table as $x_1=[0,1,2]$ and $y_1=[17,18,20]$, which gives $c=16$, so the model is $h(x)=2^x+16$.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — $h(x)=2^{x}+16$: $h(0) = 1 + 16 = 17$ ✓
  • Choice B — $h(x)=2^{x}+15$: $h(0) = 1 + 15 = 16 eq 17$ ✗
  • Choice C — $h(x)=2^{x}+2$: $h(0) = 1 + 2 = 3 eq 17$ ✗
  • Choice D — $h(x)=2^{x}$: $h(0) = 1 eq 17$ ✗
That confirms A is correct.
